rulings.Case Title: W. WONG CONSTRUCTION CO., INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPO VS. WATT KIN YUEN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 29, 2007, LINE 1. PLAINTIFF W. WONG CONSTRUCTION CO., INC., AND JAIDIN CONSULTING GROUP, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. WONG'S SUBSEQUENT CONDUCT CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO THE MEANING AND EFFECT OF PARAGRAPH 1.2. THAT CONDUCT IS NOT BARRED BY THE PAROL EVIDIENCE RULE. PARAGRAPHS 7.1, 7.3, 7.5 AND 7.6 STATE DISTINCT AND CONFLICTING EXCULPATORY CONDITIONS PRECLUDING JUDGMENT UNDER HOHE V SAN DIEGO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT (1990) 224 CAL. APP. 3D 1559. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: TOWN TAXI, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. G & M TRANSPORTATION, INC., A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 29, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANT G & M TRANSPORTATION, INC., AGGE, INC., GRATCHIA MAKARIAN, ALEKSANDER GOLODRIGA AND GENNADY EPSHTEYN Motion To Set Aside Default IS DENIED. G & M UNDERSTOOD THE IMPORTANCE OF A FILING DEADLINE BUT TOOK NO ACTION TO OBTAIN AN EXTENSION AFTER OCTOBER 9TH. G & M HAS OFFERED NO EXPLANATION FOR ITS DELAY IN BRINGING THIS MOTION. NO PROPOSED ANSWER HAS BEEN SUBMITTED AS REQUIRED BY C.C.P. SECTION 473(B). GELIN WAS NOT COUNSEL FOR G & M AND HIS CONDUCT DOES NOT PROVIDE A BASIS FOR GRANTING THE DEFAULT, NOR IS IT CREDIBLE GIVEN THE BREVITY OF THE WILEY LETTER OF NOVEMBER 7TH. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL FRANCIS PELOSI VS. GARY ROSSI et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 29, 2007, LINE 6. rulings.Case Title: DENNIS KUNG VS. HONG MIN GU et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 29, 2007, LINE 13. DEFENDANT HONG GU AND JUAN LIU'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: AS TO LIU, DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT LACKS ANY ALLEGATION AS TO LIU. AS TO GU, DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TEN DAYS. PLAINTIFF MUST ADDRESS THE STATUTE OF FRAUDS AND PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING THAT IT DOES NOT APPLY. THE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS TO PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING RELIANCE AND DAMAGES. IN THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PLEAD THAT DEFENDANT IMMIGRATED TO THE U. S. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: ABT LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. JOSE L MORALES et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 29, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT JOSE MORALES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: THE PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE WAS REQUIRED TO BE FILED FIVE DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING PER C.C.P SECTION 170.6(2) AND FOR THAT REASON, IT IS DENIED. THE SPECIAL DEMURRER FOR UNCERTAINTY IS SUSTAINED BECAUSE THE DATE ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT IN PARAGRAPHS SIX AND NINE ARE INCONSISTENT. TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S ANALYSIS OF THE DISTINCTION BETWEEN "RENT APPLICABLE" AND "LAWFUL RENT" IS THE BASIS FOR DENIAL OF THE DEFENDANT'S GENERAL DEMURRER. =(302/PJM/KD)
